//: Single source of truth for capability tiers, consumed by both the PowerShell vet phase and src/localai/installer_vet.py. The KV/weights/overhead constants MIRROR src/localai/model_scout.py (WEIGHTS_GB_PER_B, VRAM_OVERHEAD_GB, KV_GB_PER_1K_BUCKETS, KV_DTYPE_FACTORS); test_tiers_json_constants_mirror_model_scout guards the two from drifting. Do NOT edit numbers here without updating model_scout and re-running the tests.
//kv_dtype: installer sets OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE=q8_0 host-side (ref-box #1); tier gates assume q8_0. C caps at 3B: 4B@8k = 4.34 GB > 4 even at q8_0.
//pick: Per-tier chat model the installer actually pulls (Install-LocalAI Invoke-PhaseScout). source = a real Ollama tag; ctx <= tier ctx; params(source) <= max_dense_b so the pick fits min_vram_gb at q8_0 KV (guarded by test_each_tier_pick_fits_min_vram). Whole ladder is the qwen3.5 thinking family (9b / 4b / 2b) so webui-seed's unconditional think=false + presence_penalty tune is valid on every pick (findings 2+3); smaller tags for B/C/CPU so a 4 GB friend never gets the 9.5 GB daily driver.

images.note: host ComfyUI, out of installer scope v1
